title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: It's a waste of time to try and convince her.
The company's profits have fallen significantly this year.
questions.secondSentence: There (1) _________ the company's profits this year.
solutions: has been a significant fall in

questions.firstSentence: He didn't mention the problem because he didn't want to worry you.
questions.secondSentence: He didn't mention the problem (1) _________ you.

questions.firstSentence: The hotel was much more expensive than we had expected.
questions.secondSentence: The hotel was (1) _________ we had expected.

questions.firstSentence: They believe that the thief entered through the window.
questions.secondSentence: The thief is (1) _________ through the window.

questions.firstSentence: You can use my car, but you must drive carefully.
questions.secondSentence: You can use my car (1) _________ carefully.
